todo.text: Analyze one watched company using latest available metrics; deliverable: structured analysis note in projects/company-research/; success: note includes thesis, risks, and 3 key metrics
Implement one small Python utility script with tests; deliverable: script + test file under projects/learning-lab/; success: pytest passes for the new script

Draft and schedule 3 content ideas aligned to '[Personal] 🎨 Creative MVP: Create a quick 10-second motion d'; deliverable: content-plan markdown with hooks, CTA, and posting slots; success: plan saved in projects/content-strategy/
Automate one repetitive workspace workflow; deliverable: runnable script under scripts/ with usage comment header; success: script executes end-to-end on a sample run
🎨 Creative MVP: Build a simple Python automation script for a daily task; deliverable: working artifact + short demo note in projects/creative-mvp/; success: artifact created and documented
